mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HOSPITAL_UPDATE_REQUEST (HOSPITAL_ID, MEMBER_ID, MEDICAL_SUBJECTS, OPEN_TIME, CLOSE_TIME, LUNCH_TIME, HOLIDAY) VALUES (#{hospitalId}, #{memberId}, #{medicalSubjects}, #{openTime}, #{closeTime}, #{lunchTime}, #{holiday})
mapper.select: SELECT R.*, H.NAME as hospitalName FROM HOSPITAL_UPDATE_REQUEST R JOIN HOSPITAL H ON R.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID WHERE R.STATUS = 'PENDING' ORDER BY R.CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE HOSPITAL SET MEDICAL_SUBJECTS = #{medicalSubjects}, OPEN_TIME = #{openTime}, CLOSE_TIME = #{closeTime}, LUNCH_TIME = #{lunchTime}, HOLIDAY = #{holiday} WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM HOSPITAL WHERE OWNER_ID = #{ownerId} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
